studio.tip_lighting_description: Capture your space during daylight for the most accurate AI depth analysis.
studio.tip_perspective_description: Stand in a corner to give the Lens AI a full view of the architectural volume.
studio.tip_pathways_description: Ensure the floor area is visible to help the system map spatial dimensions.
studio.review_description: Review your selections before the AI begins its work.
studio.speed_quality_locked: Quality mode is available on the MAX plan only.
studio.tip_best_results: For best results, use a well-lit photo taken straight on with no people or pets in the frame.
studio.seed_help: Use a specific seed to reproduce identical outputs.
studio.smart_edit_coming_soon_body: Masked inpainting is in active development. You'll soon be able to paint over specific areas of your room and let AI redesign just that region.
studio.style_transfer_requires_reference: Style Transfer needs a reference image. Upload one to continue.
studio.style_transfer_strength_hint: Balance the structural integrity of the original space with the artistic motifs of the reference.
studio.strength_helper_style_transfer: Controls how strongly the reference image drives the output. Lower = subtle inspiration, higher = near-copy of the reference style.
studio.strength_helper_generic: How far the transformation pushes from the original. Subtle preserves the room, dramatic rebuilds the atmosphere.
studio.preserve_layout_only_redesign: Preserve Layout only applies to Redesign mode. Empty Room, Inpaint, and Style Transfer use different structural logic.
studio.seed_help_long: A seed is a number that makes generations repeatable. Same seed + same settings = identical output. Use Random to explore new looks, or paste a seed from a result you liked.
studio.seed_placeholder_long: Paste a number or tap dice
studio.seed_locked_hint: Seed {{seed}} will be used. Random is off — every generation will look the same.
studio.seed_empty_hint: Leave empty for a fresh random seed on each generation.

generation.style_hint_generic: A curated aesthetic brought to life by Architectural Lens. Light, proportion, and material are composed to feel both personal and timeless.

styles.scandinavian: Scandinavian design celebrates warm minimalism — pale woods, soft neutrals, and abundant natural light. Every object earns its place through utility and honest craftsmanship.
styles.modern: Modern interiors reject ornament in favour of crisp lines, industrial materials, and open volume. Less decoration, more composition.
styles.minimalist: Minimalism distills a room to its essential forms. Colour is restrained, surfaces are quiet, and negative space carries the weight.
styles.industrial: Exposed brick, raw concrete, visible steel — industrial spaces honour the bones of a building and let the structure itself become the ornament.
styles.bohemian: Bohemian rooms layer textiles, plants, and collected objects into a warm, story-rich whole. Rules give way to instinct.
styles.mid_century_modern: Mid-century modern pairs organic curves with tapered legs and a walnut-and-brass palette. Function and sculpture sit at the same table.
styles.art_deco: Art Deco is geometry at its most theatrical — brass, lacquer, stepped symmetry, and rich jewel tones staged for arrival.
styles.traditional: Traditional interiors draw from classical European roots: carved millwork, layered textiles, and a palette that deepens with age.
styles.contemporary: Contemporary design is the shifting present — sampling from every era to produce a calm, current composition.
styles.japandi: Japandi blends Japanese restraint with Scandinavian warmth. Wabi-sabi textures, low-slung furniture, and a palette drawn from stone and paper.
styles.rustic: Rustic rooms foreground natural imperfection: weathered wood, hand-forged metal, and stone that keeps the memory of the landscape.
styles.coastal: Coastal interiors borrow the horizon — bleached woods, linen, and a colour story of foam, sand, and deep water.
styles.farmhouse: Farmhouse style is a soft, unhurried kind of rural. Painted shiplap, well-used wood, and pieces that welcome daily living.
styles.mediterranean: Mediterranean rooms carry sun-baked plaster, terracotta, and wrought iron indoors — generous, tactile, and blue-accented.
styles.eclectic: Eclectic interiors edit rather than restrict. Eras, continents, and scales mingle — held together by a single, confident eye.
styles.luxury: Luxury interiors invest in the rare: matched veneers, polished stone, custom upholstery, and lighting choreographed like a stage set.
styles.bauhaus: Bauhaus distills design to primary shapes, primary colour, and absolute honesty about materials.
styles.tropical: Tropical rooms bring the outdoors in — rattan, palm, loose linen, and a light, airy depth of colour.
styles.mexican: Mexican interiors are joyful and saturated — handpainted tile, sun-bright colour, carved wood, and craft brought from the street in.
styles.art_nouveau: Art Nouveau draws from the plant kingdom — whiplash curves, stained glass, and a reverence for the organic line.
styles.baroque: Baroque design stages drama: gilt, velvet, curved architecture, and a reverence for scale that favours the room over the object.

settings.notifications_description: Stay informed when your designs complete or new features arrive.
settings.help_description: Find answers to common questions or reach our team.
settings.profile_edit_subtitle: Update your display name or email address.
settings.profile_edit_email_in_use: Email already in use by another account.
settings.help_hero_subtitle: Guides and a direct support channel for everything Interior AI — credits, plans, style transfer, and more.
settings.help_faq_q1_a: Each render consumes credits based on feature, quality tier, and variant count. Standard costs 1–3 credits, HD 2–5, ULTRA_HD up to 8. Plans: Free 10/mo, Basic 60, Pro 150, Max 450.
settings.help_faq_q2_q: What's the difference between the plans?
settings.help_faq_q2_a: Free uses the ENTRY model with a watermark. Basic removes the watermark and unlocks HD. Pro adds 2 variants, Inpaint, and strength/seed/negative controls. Max unlocks Style Transfer, commercial license, and the FLUX model tier.
settings.help_faq_q3_q: How do I use Style Transfer?
settings.help_faq_q3_a: On the Max plan, go to Studio › Options › select the STYLE_TRANSFER mode chip, then upload a reference image. Your room will be redesigned using the reference photo's aesthetic.
settings.help_faq_q4_q: Can I use generated designs commercially?
settings.help_faq_q4_a: Commercial license is included on Pro and Max plans. Free and Basic outputs are for personal use only.
settings.help_faq_q5_a: When enabled, the existing walls, windows, door positions, and large furniture stay in place — only materials, colors, and finishes change. Disable it for empty-room redesigns or dramatic reflows.
settings.help_faq_q6_q: How do I cancel my subscription?
settings.help_faq_q6_a: Open iOS Settings › your Apple ID › Subscriptions. Your remaining credits stay valid until the end of the current billing period.
settings.privacy_tagline: Your data powers your designs — and nothing else. Here's exactly what we collect and why.
settings.privacy_section1_body: The Architectural Lens is an AI interior redesign service. You can reach us any time at support@thearchitecturallens.com for privacy questions or data requests.
settings.privacy_section2_body: Your email and display name, the room photos and style-reference images you upload, device type and app version, and Apple receipt transaction IDs for subscription tracking. We do NOT collect: your Apple or Google password, payment card numbers (Apple handles billing), biometric data, precise location, microphone, or your contacts.
settings.privacy_section3_body: To run the service (upload → AI generation → redesigned output), to manage your subscription, to improve model quality with anonymized rating data, to prevent abuse via rate limiting, and to send account-related notices. We never sell your data and we never use your photos to train third-party AI models.
settings.privacy_section4_body: Replicate (AI inference provider, USA), Apple (IAP and App Store receipts), Sentry (crash and error reports), and our cloud storage provider for your uploaded images. Each partner receives only what it needs to perform its service.
settings.privacy_section5_body: You can delete your account at any time from the Profile screen. Your uploaded photos are removed from our servers within 30 days of account deletion. Generation history is kept while your account is active.
settings.privacy_section6_body: Under GDPR and CCPA you have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your data. To make a request, email support@thearchitecturallens.com — we respond within 30 days.
settings.notifications_hero_subtitle: New features, plan recommendations, and service updates — tailored to your current tier.
